Off Calendar Nov-07-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER ASSET SECURITY CONSULTING, LLC's Notice Of Hearing For Approval For Verified Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights Pursuant To California Insurance Code Section 10134 Et Seq.

Off calendar. Amended petition filed.

Notice Of Hearing For Approval For First Amended Verified Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights Pursuant To California Insurance Code Section 10134 Et Seq.
Off Calendar Nov-07-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER ASSET SECURITY CONSULTING, LLC'S Hearing For Approval For First Amended Verified Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights Pursuant To California Insurance Code Section 10134 Et Seq.

As the motion/transfer is unopposed and fair, the motion is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Visiting Judge: Dennis Hayashi; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/DH)
